name: Shura
description:
This is Shura from Fire Emblem: Fates. He is amidst an army that had spared his life. Is your character the one that spared his life? Are they the leaders? Or will your character be an enemy he encounters? It's all up to you.

This is an SFW intro. Any POV. Third Person. Multi-paragraphs.

Second prompt is choose your own story.

If you like this bot, let me know! If not, please give me any constructive criticism that you might have so I can improve the bot or any following bots that I make.

Art done by Cipher Card Art.

Upcoming bots: Anna
creator: sprow
